raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX, placed an order with GAP, INC totaling {$180.00} that was never delivered. On XX/XX/XXXX, GAP customer service acknowledged that the order was lost and that GAP was at fault. But instead of issuing a refund, they directed me to a third-party claims administrator XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ). 

I filed a claim on XX/XX/XXXX. This claim was automatically denied due to my return history, even though this situation does not involve a return but rather merchandise that was never received. Additionally, Ive always completed my returns in line with company policies. 

While there is technically a way to contest the denial, the process is confusing, time-consuming, and may take 24 weeks. I have already spent hours attempting to resolve this with GAP customer service and XXXX XXXX XXXX customer service. 

GAP has not refunded me for merchandise they confirmed was lost. I have opened a credit card dispute and am seeking a refund for goods not received. 

Order number : # XXXX XXXX  authorization ID : XXXX
